requiredInput: VERIFIED IMPLEMENTATION: PR #30 created five files under app/frontend: index.html, styles.css, app.js, README.md, and tests/validate-foundation.mjs. Required changes before merge: add persistent state, replace browser alerts with in-UI feedback, add keyboard focus-visible styling, remove possible duplicate click listeners, and replace the external placeholder Duey image. Recommendation: changes_required. Prepare the Founder decision package from this evidence. Return ONLY one valid JSON object with no introduction and no markdown fence: {"type":"founder_review","decision":"request_changes","comments":["what was built and what passed"],"risks":["remaining merge blockers"],"nextAction":"Send the five verified corrections back to Codex before Founder approval."}
